title: block-drive input spec
description:
Inputs to one ``block-drive`` tick.

Both fields are optional so a bare tick can recover its position purely from
durable state: on a RESUME the ``run_id`` names the parked run whose
``pending_decision`` + decision journal carry everything; on a FRESH start the
``workflow`` names which chain (``submit`` / ``status`` / ``aggregate`` /
``campaign``) to begin. ``dry_run`` prints the planned action without
executing any span.

run_id.description: The run being driven. On a RESUME this keys the pending_decision + decision-journal reads that recover the parked position; on a FRESH start it is the run the first span will operate on.
run_id.title: Run Id

workflow.description: The workflow family to drive (submit / status / aggregate / campaign). Required for a FRESH chain start (picks the first block from block_chain.ORDER); recovered from the resume cursor on a RESUME.
workflow.title: Workflow

dry_run.description: Print the planned action and exit without executing any span.
dry_run.title: Dry Run
